section.textContent: Bedtime StoriesNoah and the Great FloodThe world grows dark with wickedness, but one faithful man hears God’s voice. As rain begins to fall, Noah’s trust is rewarded with a promise written in the sky.18 minMediumMale voiceStoryDavid and the GiantA shepherd boy steps onto a battlefield where warriors tremble. With nothing but a sling and unshakable faith, David faces the impossible.16 minMediumFema
